title: Request rumor types, memo IDB store, pure dedupe helpers

exports: timing constants (PROFILE_STALENESS_MS, REQUEST_DEDUPE_MS, UNANSWERED_RETRY_MS, UNANSWERED_MAX_ATTEMPTS, RELAY_BACKOFF_MIN_MS, RELAY_BACKOFF_MAX_MS)

changes: clearAllGroupData now calls clearProfileRequestMemos('*') to wipe all memos
mergeMemberProfile updated to preserve existing.signedEvent when incoming profile has no signedEvent (LWW by updatedAt)

co_location_decision.choice: new file profileRequestStorage.ts co-located in app/src/lib/marmot/
co_location_decision.rationale: joinRequestStorage.ts is a standalone *Storage.ts file with its own idb-keyval createStore. Following the same pattern keeps the memo store independently testable and parallel to joinRequestStorage. groupStorage.ts imports clearProfileRequestMemos from profileRequestStorage.ts to wire it into clearAllGroupData.

recordRequestAnswered_behavior.always: sets lastAnsweredAt=now, attempts=0, preserves lastRequestAt from prev or now if absent

mergeMemberProfile_ac021.change: When incoming profile.updatedAt > existing.updatedAt (LWW wins), spread incoming profile but preserve existing.signedEvent when incoming.signedEvent is absent
mergeMemberProfile_ac021.invariant: Once a signedEvent is stored for a MemberProfile, it persists through future LWW updates that lack one — legacy unsigned peers can't clobber a verified signed event

profileRequestSync.test.ts: serialiseProfileRequest: JSON validity, fields, nonce randomness
parseProfileRequestPayload: valid input, malformed JSON, missing type, missing targetPubkey, empty targetPubkey, wrong types, round-trip
isProfileStale: undefined/null profile, exactly stale, older, fresh (now), within window
shouldEmitRequest: full parameterised truth table (19 cases via it.each)
pickBackoffMs: finite, range check on first call, range check over 200 calls (property test), full-range sanity
